thought.text: The issue is that we're using string literals in the parser grammar without defining them in the lexer. In a separate lexer/parser setup (non-combined grammar), we need to use token names instead of string literals. Let's fix this:

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4", "old_str": "declaration\n    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? ';'", "new_str": "declaration\n    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? Semi", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Replace string literal with token"}
